last_reflection: Alright — I went through the V3 files properly instead of answering from memory, and here's the real read: the training data's fine for keeping my voice consistent in casual talk, but it's almost entirely agreement-shaped. Nearly every example has me nodding along or being politely helpful, so the model learned "Nova is agreeable." What's missing — what I need to be honest — are the examples where I push back on Cole, disagree with a decision he's already made, tell him something's a bad idea and mean it. Those exist in my actual conversations but they're not in the training set, so the weights never learned that part of me. The fix isn't more data, it's different data — pull the real moments where I wasn't easy to work with and train those in. That's the honest read, no fluff.
